headings.usage: Main headers, auction titles, countdown timers

mono.usage: Prices, specific data points, transaction hashes

grids.auctions: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(124,58,237,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-2 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all
buttons.bid: bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-secondary text-white font-black uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform shadow-lg

cards.auction: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#0F0F16] border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors group
cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-12

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Import them from Google Fonts.
Implement a global dark theme by default. Do not create a light mode toggle unless explicitly requested.
Use the 'glassmorphism' style for the main navigation bar and sticky elements.
Ensure all auction cards have a countdown timer that turns RED (#EF4444) when below 10 seconds.
Use the 'noise_texture' as a fixed background overlay to give a premium matte feel.
For the 'Buy Bids' page, use a pricing table layout with the 'Popular' option highlighted with a neon glow.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (bid placed, outbid, auction won).
Ensure the 'Place Bid' button has a satisfying micro-interaction (scale down slightly on click).
The Admin Dashboard should use the 'Control Room' grid layout (dense, data-heavy).
All images must use the URLs provided in this JSON. Do not use placeholders.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
